title: Fantastic Four
content: The Fantastic Four are a fictional superhero team appearing in American comic book s published by Marvel Comics. They debuted in "The Fantastic Four" #1 (cover date d Nov. 1961), helping usher in a new level of realism in the medium. They were the first superhero team created by artist/co-plotter Jack Kirby and editor/co-plotter Stan Lee, who developed a collaborative approach to creating comics with this title.
